candidate_definitions.text: This is an official implementation for "Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows" on Object Detection and Instance Segmentation.

This repo contains the supported code and configuration files to reproduce object detection results of [Swin Transformer](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2103.14030.pdf). It is based on [mmdetection](https://github.com/open-mmlab/mmdetection).

candidate_glosses.text: This repo contains the supported code and configuration files to reproduce object detection results of [Swin Transformer](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2103.14030.pdf). It is based on [mmdetection](https://github.com/open-mmlab/mmdetection).
